message:
🐛 Fix UI compliance test: mock shapes and cold-start handling (#1087)

- Return array [] for /api/dashboards (not {items:[]}) to prevent
  "dashboards is not iterable" crash in SearchDropdown
- Return [] for catch-all /api/** to match expected response shapes
- Add /api/config/** mock returning {} for config endpoints
- Remove redundant addInitScript per-batch; clear caches via
  page.evaluate instead (addInitScript is cumulative)
- Add 180s manifest timeout for warmup phase (cold Vite dev server)
- Add browser console error/exception capture for debugging
- Add periodic debug logging during manifest wait

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
